patch.value: aggregate is the only query-family command left without a consolidation child under pm-n7rr: it does grouped item counts, overlapping both list (filters/projections) and stats (totals, moving under pm ops per pm-6apl). Per ADR pm-pbyu (one noun per domain, projections are flags), fold it as a --group-by/--count-by projection on list, or as ops stats --by. Decide the exact spelling in-item against the grammar table, wire the alias shim via pm-0z7n, and follow the full wiring checklist (commands/index, register-mutation, mcp/server, sdk/cli-contracts, contracts.ts, completions, docs, vitest.config, contracts:update). Depends on the alias shim foundation.
Fold aggregate into the query nouns: pm list --group-by/--count-by (or ops stats --by), retire the aggregate top-level

Grouped-count queries are reachable from a consolidated noun (list or ops stats) with identical output fields; aggregate keeps working as a hidden alias emitting the one-line migration hint per ADR pm-pbyu; contracts/completions/docs/MCP regenerated; spelling-parity spec covers old vs new invocation
